# virtualbox_vm (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the virtual machine.

### Optional

- `cpus` (Number) Number of CPU cores.
- `disk_path` (String) Path to the virtual disk (VDI). Defaults to ~/VirtualBox VMs/<name>/<name>.vdi.
- `disk_size_mb` (Number) Size of the virtual disk in MB. Set to 0 to skip disk creation.
- `iso_controller` (String) Storage controller name to attach the ISO to. Default: 'IDE'.
- `iso_path` (String) Path to an ISO image to attach as a DVD drive for installation.
- `memory` (Number) Amount of RAM in MB.
- `os_type` (String) The guest OS type (e.g., 'Ubuntu_64', 'Windows10_64', 'Other').
- `start_on_create` (Boolean) Start the VM after creation.
- `storage_controller` (String) Name for the SATA storage controller. Default: 'SATA'.
- `vram` (Number) Video RAM in MB.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String) The current status of the VM (e.g., 'running', 'poweroff').
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the virtual machine.
